gate_question: Does this exact current protocol, with current live state, allow an unprivileged attacker to extract funds or rewards beyond entitlement?

candidate.title_or_claim: recoverStuckDividend has no access control at the Portal.sol entry point; role enforcement is entirely delegated to unindexed PORTAL_TWEAK implementation
candidate.claimed_root_cause: Portal.sol:recoverStuckDividend carries no onlyRole, hasRole, or onlyIfBitFlagsSet modifier; the sole security boundary is inside the PORTAL_TWEAK delegatecall target whose source is not present in the indexed repository
candidate.claimed_impact: Unprivileged EOA calls recoverStuckDividend with attacker-controlled taxToken and recipient, causing emergencyWithdraw on a live Dividend contract and transferring dividend tokens to the attacker

live_preconditions.name: At least one live Dividend contract with non-zero token balance exists
live_preconditions.observed_value: DividendEmergencyWithdrawn event present in ABI inventory; no concrete balance confirmed from live_context

live_preconditions.name: PORTAL_TWEAK implementation address on live proxy
live_preconditions.observed_value: PORTAL_TWEAK is an immutable in PortalBase.sol L265; runtime value not present in live_context

live_preconditions.name: PORTAL_TWEAK enforces AUDITOR_ROLE on recoverStuckDividend
live_preconditions.observed_value: IPortal.sol L2027-2031 NatSpec states 'Only callable by AUDITOR_ROLE'; no concrete enforcement visible in indexed source because PortalTweak.sol is absent from the repository
live_preconditions.command_if_missing: vm.prank(address(0xdead)); portal.recoverStuckDividend(params); // fork test — revert = REJECT, success = HIGH_CONFIDENCE_CANDIDATE

source_code_basis.why_it_matters: Entry point carries no modifier; unconditionally delegates to PORTAL_TWEAK with full Portal storage context
PORTAL_TWEAK is an immutable; its source is not present in the indexed repository, making static role-check verification impossible
NatSpec documents 'Only callable by AUDITOR_ROLE'; this is the only place AUDITOR_ROLE enforcement is stated for this function — it is interface-only, not a concrete check
Contrast: setBitFlags applies onlyRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE) at the Portal.sol layer; recoverStuckDividend applies nothing at the Portal.sol layer
Struct exposes attacker-controlled 'to' (recipient) and 'taxToken' fields; if PORTAL_TWEAK lacks the role check, attacker directs withdrawn dividend tokens to any address

attacker_path.actor: Unprivileged EOA (no role membership required at Portal.sol layer)
attacker_inputs: taxToken: address of a live V3 tax token whose Dividend contract holds a non-zero balance
call_sequence: Portal._delegateToImpl(PORTAL_TWEAK) executes PORTAL_TWEAK logic in Portal storage context
IF PORTAL_TWEAK omits or has bypassable AUDITOR_ROLE check: resolves Dividend contract via IFlapTaxTokenV3(taxToken).dividendContract()
Calls Dividend.emergencyWithdraw(amount, to) transferring dividend tokens to attacker
state_before: Dividend contract holds non-zero ERC-20 dividend token balance

extraction_analysis.asset_or_reward: ERC-20 dividend tokens held in Dividend contracts deployed by Portal for V3 tax tokens
extraction_analysis.attacker_gain: Full or partial dividend token balance of targeted Dividend contract(s)
extraction_analysis.victim_or_protocol_loss: Token holders entitled to dividend distributions lose their accrued dividend balance
extraction_analysis.why_gain_exceeds_entitlement: Attacker has no AUDITOR_ROLE and no legitimate claim to dividend funds; entitlement is zero

setup: Fork BSC at block 108382650 against proxy 0xe2ce6ab80874fa9fa2aae65d277dd6b8e65c9de0
Query recent DividendEmergencyWithdrawn or TokenDividendTokenUpdated events to identify a live taxToken with a non-zero Dividend contract balance
Record Dividend contract token balance before call
Prepare attacker as a fresh EOA with no roles
expected_assertions: vm.expectRevert() — call must revert with an AccessControl error if PORTAL_TWEAK enforces AUDITOR_ROLE
If call does NOT revert: assert dividendContract.balanceOf(dividendToken) decreased AND attacker balance increased → HIGH_CONFIDENCE_CANDIDATE
local_proof_required.reject_if_assertion_fails: If call reverts with AccessControl error → REJECT; PORTAL_TWEAK correctly enforces AUDITOR_ROLE at runtime despite no Portal.sol-layer modifier
